mapper.select: SELECT * FROM order_ratings WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND rater_id = #{raterId}
SELECT * FROM order_ratings WHERE rated_id = #{ratedId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(rating), 5.0) FROM order_ratings WHERE rated_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM order_ratings WHERE rated_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_ratings (id, order_id, rater_id, rated_id, rating, comment, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{orderId}, #{raterId}, #{ratedId}, #{rating}, #{comment}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
